texto: Cruelty links all three primitives [pleasure, pain, and desire]: Spinoza defines it as the desire to inflict pain on someone we love or pity. Financial speaking, cruelty is analogous to a convertible bond whose debt and equity depend on three economic underliers: the stock price, the level of interest rates, and the credit worthiness of the company's debt.
explicacao: Citação de Emanuel Derman sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Cruelty links all three primitives [pleasure, pain, and desire]: Spinoza defines it as the desire…” articula autoestima, finance, non-fiction em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como termino e non-fiction.
